title: UdonMod
description: This is my first time to make Minecraft mod.
body:
# Udon Mod
## Overview
- Adding few cooking items, foods, armors and attack tools.
- All added foods grant unique effects to players.
- The added armor will grant effects to the player when fully equipped.
- The added attack tools have unique abilities that help players.


## Items
This mod use a lot of wheat. Flower is made from wheat. All udon use flower. Following these next steps, player can make Udon (tools).

1. Get wheat, Katsuo (Fishing or kill Katsuo in ocean). (Iwashi is optional item. It can upgrade Udon foods.)
2. Craft Stonemill block and Dyring Machine.
3. Dry Katsuo (and Iwashi).
4. Craft flowers and Katsuo flakes by milling wheats.
5. Craft Raw udon by combine 3 flowers and an egg.
6. Boil Raw udon to make boiled udon.
7. Combine boiled udon and some ingredients (Katsuo flakes and other optional ingredeients).

### Katana (Sword)
- Bukkake Katana
- Cold Katana
- Curry Katana
- Kitsune Katana (Fox Katana)
- Zaru Katana (Colander)

### Armor
- Bukkake Armor
- Cold Armor
- Curry Armor
- Kitsune Armor
- Zaru Armor

### Udon Foods
Udon has 2 types, normal and rich one.
- Bukkake Udon
- Cold Udon
- Curry Udon
- Kitsune Udon
- Zaru Udon
